subject: LU-12355 llite: totalram_pages changed to atomic_long_t

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 1:

For what it's worth get_totalram_pages() isn't a great name and have two identical macro checks is not ideal but it didn't seem right to add dependancies between lustre and libcfs.

Patch Set 1:

Code-wise looks good to me.

parents.subject: LU-10070 utils: SEL: lfs find & getstripe support

commit.subject: LU-12355 llite: totalram_pages changed to atomic_long_t
commit.message:
LU-12355 llite: totalram_pages changed to atomic_long_t

Kernel 5.0 changed totalram_pages to atomic_long_t
Provide an abstracted accessor now that totalram_pages
is now a function

Linux-commit: ca79b0c211af63fa3276f0e3fd7dd9ada2439839

Test-Parameters: trivial
Change-Id: I558e42074004e2ee5f79deea0d363e5bea332729
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <stancheff@cray.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/35025
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Petros Koutoupis <pkoutoupis@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
